questions.q: Why were Mira's parents not at home?
options: They went to visit a neighbor

questions.q: What made Mira very happy?
options: Her parents bought her new shoes
Her parents bought the things she asked for
Her parents brought home a puppy

questions.q: Where does the turtle live?
What does the turtle always carry?
Why did Mana Lita scold the children?
What did the friends and their parents do in the end?
options: They asked Mana Lita for forgiveness

questions.q: What did the frog ask the animals?
options: What their children liked to eat

questions.q: Why did the frog become very afraid?
What do people say the Kandiwata rock once was?
What lesson does the story teach?
options: Care for beautiful places and respect local stories

questions.q: What happened to Apoy Garing's rose plant?
What blessing did the enchanted butterfly give Apoy Garing?
options: Any plant she planted would grow

questions.q: Why did Pedro become sad?
What made Pedro and his family happy again?
options: They heard there was medicine for Covid

questions.q: Why were children told not to go outside or gather together?
What did Potpot's family start doing regularly?
options: Washing hands and following health rules

questions.q: What did Banog try to do?
options: Build a nest on Mount Huraw

questions.q: What did Banog learn after falling?
options: Not to force himself when he cannot do something

questions.q: Why was Kaha sad in the store?
options: She thought her owner had left her because she was useless
She wanted to ride the bus again

questions.q: How did Kaha learn she still had value?
options: A child reused her for small items
She went back to the farm
